text: Product category report for Furniture: The Furniture category the most sold product was KI Adjustable-Height Table and was overall barely profitable category with a margin of 2.5% while having a below-average performing sales among all categories. The total sales were $741999.80. Additionally the average discount given was 17.4% (60.6% of orders were discounted).

Product category report for Office Supplies: The Office Supplies category the most sold product was Staple envelope and was overall moderately profitable category with a margin of 17.0% while having one of the weakest performing sales among all categories. The total sales were $719047.03. Additionally the average discount given was 15.7% (48.1% of orders were discounted).

Product category report for Technology: The Technology category the most sold product was Logitech 910-002974 M325 Wireless Mouse for Web Scrolling and was overall moderately profitable category with a margin of 17.4% while having one of the strongest performing sales among all categories. The total sales were $836154.03. Additionally the average discount given was 13.2% (54.9% of orders were discounted).
